title: 6B Online Blunders — Фразы с right и wrong

items.example: I was sure I was in the right and everyone else was incorrect.

items.phrase: rub someone up the wrong way
items.example: I can't stand this presenter — the way she speaks really rubs me up the wrong way.
This knowledge is dangerous and must never get into the wrong hands.
Things are going well with the project — we're on the right track so far.

items.phrase: get the wrong end of the stick
items.example: Jane got the wrong end of the stick and waited for me at the bus stop instead of the cinema.
The wedding was planned carefully so that nothing would go wrong.
Once we know what mistake we made, we can put it right.
Tom believed he was in charge, but I soon put him right.
